guidance: Teach ONE specific, actionable tactic they can do this week to make more money. Real steps, scripts, or settings — worth paying for.
evidence_note: Tactics must be logically airtight and actually executable as described.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Education / Informative' was the most under-served eligible category (target 20%, recent 14%).
post_rationale: Reframed from an unverifiable 'April 2026 update' and a fabricated removal statistic to Google's actual, longstanding review-gating and solicitation policy. Keeps the carousel format for the compliance checklist and still delivers a concrete 3-step fix owners can act on today.

guidance: State a sharp, defensible point of view or contrarian take on how service businesses actually grow. Confident, specific, never gimmicky engagement-bait.
evidence_note: Framed clearly as Black Arrow's view; no fabricated proof.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Contrarian / Brand Point of View' was the most under-served eligible category (target 5%, recent 0%).
post_rationale: Reels still carry the reach edge for cold audiences, and this stakes out a sharp, unclaimed brand POV (scaling ads before fixing follow-up burns money faster) that no past post has argued directly.
